full_text:
Liu Jie
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Jiewas born in Ji’nan. From a powerful family, protected his bandit retainers. Eventually punished by becoming a conscript solider. Liu Jie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
